entry.title: Is there any equivalent app to J3RKKRD / J3RKKRS on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system and looking for equivalent applications to the following on-premise programs:

J3RKKRD – Russia: G/L Account Balance

J3RKKRS – Russia: G/L Account Line Items

I’ve already searched in the Fiori App Library and found some apps that seem to have similar functionality. However, when I checked the Business Catalog listed in the library, I couldn’t find any matching catalogs available in our public cloud system for role assignment.

I would like to ask:

Are there standard apps in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that are functionally equivalent to J3RKKRD and J3RKKRS?

If yes, what is the Business Catalog associated with them?

If the apps are available in the library but not in our system, is there any way to activate or request them? 

Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.title: How to handle goods lost during transit?
entry.content: We have a scenario where suppliers sent the goods against PO to us but they were lost by logistic partner. However we still need to pay supplier. How to handle this?

entry.title: VAT exchange rate
entry.content:
Hi, domestic invoice is received in foreign currency, invoice needs to have VAT value in local.  Invoice date is not necessarily a match with this VAT f/x rate used in the invoice as it can be based on delivery date.  

Is there a way to solve this in SAP ECC?  There is Note for S/4 Hana public cloud version that I think is suitable but I did not find any for ECC.

entry.title: Help Global System Settings FIN-CS
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

The options:

  • Reclassification: Selection Object in Trigger

  • Validation in SAP S/4HANA

  • Breakdown Category: Selection Object in Maximum Selection

  • Currency Translation: Selection Object

  • Use Item Role Attribute

do not appear in the Global System Settings (Transaction CXB3), and SAP is asking me to change them before upgrading to S/4HANA 2023.

However, I don't understand how to do this, because in Note 3326805, it says to activate these fields, but they do not appear in this transaction (CXB3) . I would like to understand the relevance of this, whether I really need to change it, and how to do so.

Thank you very much!

Attached is how CXB3 appears for me.

entry.title: CJIA report payment issue
entry.content:
We have activated the Project Cash Management feature.

  1. First step - A purchase order was created - with an account assignment category for the project (WBS element) and mandatory down payments on the items of the purchase order.

 

The total purchase order value is €225,000. The amount of down payments to be paid to the supplier for this purchase order is €135,000.

  1. At this point, we have the following values in the CJIA report (Project Actual and Commt Paymt LIs) - there is a total order amount with a value type of 51 “ Purchase order (PO)”. But there is no information at all about the amount of down payments to be paid to the supplier.

  1. Next step - A Down Payment Request was created via ME2DP “Down-Payment Monitoring for PO”.

  1. At this point, the report CJIA (Project Actual and Commt Paymt LIs) displays the amount of the Down payment request with the value type 58 “ Down payment request”. But there is no reduction of the value 51 “ Purchase order (PO)”. And the total amount of expected payments in Project management is incorrect.

Questions:

Why doesn't the CJIA report show the expected down payments that have been completed on purchase order line items?

Why doesn't the Down payment request created from a purchase order reduce the expected payments for that purchase order?

entry.title: dunning notice generated but spool is in error
entry.content:
Synopsis

Dunning parameters entered

dunning scheduled done

1dunning notice generated of which 1 to be sent

dunning print out done with LP01

entry.title: Is it possible to download the DME tree
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is it possible to download the DME tree (tags) from the configuration (100558). If yes, please let me know how we can download it.

 

Thanks & regards,

Kavitha D

entry.title: RFOPENPOSTING_FR functionality
entry.content:
Hello,

Can any one please explian the functionality of RFOPENPOSTING_FR transaction. I understand from the program documentation that is used to create the FEC file and this program posts the opening balance of the closed fiscal year in the next fiscal year.

But does this program post only the closing balances of Customer and Vendor reconciliation account or all the balance sheet GLs?

Any help would be appreciated.

 

Thanks

Prasad Garude.

entry.title: Customers Payment API https://api.sap.com/api/ccpcustpayment/overview
entry.content:
Dear Team 

We are trying to post incoming customer payments via API which should also clear the customer invoices. 

Has someone used this API, can this be used for this requirement. 

https://api.sap.com/api/ccpcustpayment/overview
 
We have already explored the other journalentry APIs, it does he work but there has to be two API calls, 1 for payment and second for clearing but due to a already very high transactions volume we dont want to post two documents

entry.title: 统驭科目记账屏幕放出利润中心/自定义字段
entry.content:
我们公司有些板块，只上总账模块，不上销售和采购模块，但客户/供应商类统驭科目需要按利润中心的维度核算，

1、系统是否可以在APP：创建进项发票、创建销项发票，客商页签增加利润中心维度。

2、在创建客户/供应商凭证API的时候，也能相应的做增加？

3、如果利润中心字段不允许的话，自定义字段是否可以？

entry.title: The transaction ABUMN doesn"t have the input field -Unit of measurement and has an error message
entry.content: Our business can"t to any partial transfer with the transaction ABUMN, as they always get the standard error message "Enter both quantity and unit of measure". Please see the screenshot in the attachment. The problem is not only in FIP, but also in every test and develpment system. Could you please help how to set the field "unit of measure"? Thanks.

entry.title: How can the ledger be configured to display the GST amount consolidated for each invoice?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S4HANA Public Cloud, we need to display the GST amount consolidated for each invoice. Could you suggest any required configurations for this?

Thank you.

@Finance  # GST # Report

entry.title: VALUATION AREAS 01 AND 51 DO NOT ACCOUNT HOMOGENEOUSLY
entry.content:
When a new item is added to an already created asset account due to a purchase, the depreciation of the asset and the capital grant are consistent. In both cases, they depreciate the same amount, which is what the system should do. The problem identified arises when the addition is due to a fixed cash transfer using the ABUMN transaction. The depreciation amounts are not the same when they should be.

The conclusion is that both cases should be the same. However, they are not, and the correct calculation would be the one performed with the capital subsidy, not the accounting department.

The difference is that area 51 calculates the amortization based on the reference date and the 01 from the following month, but that happens because the asset is old (from previous years)

In this case the calculation is the same because it is based on the reference date, as it is within the fiscal year.

More information: As the system is configured, both depreciation areas must begin calculating depreciation the following month (as area 01 does). Indeed, it was determined that depreciation calculation begins the following month. However, in the case of a late asset acquisition, depreciation would also begin the following month, but taking into account the reference period indicated for the asset. Therefore, the calculation would include the months of delay from when the acquisition should have been made. For assets corresponding to unclosed fiscal years, areas 01 and 51 act uniformly, and in the opposite case, they do not, hence the discrepancy that should not occur.

entry.title: Industry Field Not Updated in supplier invoice line items
entry.content:
Hello Team

We have maintained the Industry field in supplier master data. When the supplier invoice is posted its not showing on the supplier line items report. 

Has someone used this functionality

entry.title: Credit Note Adjustment through API in Public cloud
entry.content:
Sabari has various credit note adjustment scenarios being received against customer invoices. This data is being received from their internal DMS application via CP and being posted into SAP through standard APIs. There are many scenarios on how the data can be received:

  • One credit note adjusting against one customer invoice
  • One credit note adjusting against multiple invoices of the same customer
  • One invoice adjusting against multiple credit notes of the same customer

When the data is received, it is split into separate sets, and each set is individually processed and posted to SAP. We found that the same credit note or invoice may be duplicated in different scenarios. Hence, the Customer Account has to be cleared in SAP after each scenario is processed, to ensure the exact balances are reflected.

Sabari is receiving data from multiple DMS systems (different Supplier Dealer Management Systems), and to process the Credit Note Adjustment data for 1 supplier and 1 day, they have to clear the customer accounts at least 4 times for each Business units ( 6 Business units x 4 times = 24 times manual clearing on  a daily basis) . This is too much manual process at the moment, and we are looking at the best options to automate this. 

APIs

Thanks,

Vignesh

entry.title: Automation for cheque bounce process in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Sabari is in the wholesale and distribution industry and has collection data across various branches across the states of Kerala and Tamil Nadu. The collection data is posted daily via API calls. Some of the payments are received via Cheques and they are posted similarly to the other payment receipts. The Customer account will be cleared after the payment is received.

After the checks are presented to the Bank, in a few cases, the checks may bounce. This data has to be reversed in the customer Accounts receivable that has already been posted and cleared in SAP. We have to reset and reverse the cleared items for a case with a bounced check. We have an API available to reverse the posted documents, but there is no option to reset the cleared items with this API. Currently, Sabari is managing this manually and they have a volume of 75-100 cheques per day across all the branches, which may be bounced.

APIs API Management SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation 

Thanks,

Vignesh

entry.title: need help with Electronic Bank Statement MT940, problem with amount in file
entry.content:
Hi expert, i need help with my MT940 file.

I'm trying to configure Electronic Bank Statement using MT940 file. i've already done configuration, and ready to upload the file. The file uploaded succesfully, but the amount posted to SAP is the wrong one. i figure the problem is from MT940 file itself.

Amount from MT 940 is "25000000 (25.000.000) rupiah". meanwhile, the real amount is only 250.000 rupiah.  How can i divide the amount by /100 so the amount posted to SAP is 250.000? or can i use string so SAP will read two last zeros as coma?

Nb: my sistem define IDR is without comma.

Thanks a lot for your help!

entry.title: BUDGET EXCEEDED - EMAIL CUSTOMIZATION
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

When the budget is exceeded, one email should be sent. this is the email and i want to change it using dynamic values. ( Please contact Oder &owner& (Name)).

 

Can any one guide me how to use se61 to update the email or any other road.

Thanks !

entry.title: Clarification on Time Conversion and Material Cost Calculation (second to milliseconds conversion)
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are maintaining very low timing in the routing, which is typically in milliseconds. As a result, the material cost is also expected to be a small amount. However, since the system is calculating the time in milliseconds and the cost is already low, it appears that the values are being rounded off to zero in the costing.

We would like to understand where this rounding is happening, why it's occurring, and what the root cause might be.

SAP S/4HANA Finance SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance SAP Product Lifecycle Costing, cloud edition 

Thanks,

Vignesh
